name: claudia-web-app
description: CLAUDIA - Tu Asistente Inteligente de Construcción

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:lazy && npm run build:css
scripts.build:js: npm run bundle:js && npm run minify:js
scripts.build:lazy: npm run minify:photos && npm run minify:calendar && npm run minify:pdf && npm run minify:voice && npm run minify:collab
scripts.bundle:js: cat js/claudia-utils.js js/claudia-lazy-loader.js js/claudia-optimizations.js js/claudia-smart.js js/claudia-pro.js js/claudia-pro-patches.js js/claudia-apu-enhancements.js js/claudia-theme.js js/claudia-mobile-pro.js js/claudia-skeleton-loaders.js js/claudia-smart-forms.js js/claudia-onboarding-fixed.js js/claudia-notifications.js js/claudia-ui-cleanup.js js/claudia-cost-optimizer.js js/claudia-price-comparison.js js/claudia-price-alerts.js js/claudia-smart-shopping.js js/claudia-bulk-optimizer.js > js/claudia.bundle.js
scripts.analyze: echo 'Bundle Analysis:' && du -h js/claudia.bundle.js js/claudia.bundle.min.js css/claudia-optimized.css css/claudia.min.css
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cd .. && firebase deploy --only hosting

author: Claude Code
